banner.title: Now Selling
banner.subtitle:
The most anticipated masterplanned
community in Burnaby

amenities.title:
More
Amenities
amenities.copy: With over 75,000 square feet of life-enriching amenities, it’s not hard to imagine what a day at Gilmore Place might entail. Watch a beautiful sunset from the private Sky Lounge, take a stroll through elevated private green spaces, or melt your worries away in the steam room or sauna. Practice for your next 18 holes with friends at the golf simulator, or play fetch with your puppy at the rooftop dog park. Satisfy your mind, body and soul each day with the state-of-the-art fitness centre, indoor and outdoor pools, multi-sport court and more.

featured.title: More Wellness
featured.copy: With a professionally equipped gym, spin studio, steam room, hydrotherapy pools, and so much more, Gilmore Place makes it easy to stay in shape – both body and mind.

featured.title: More Fun
featured.copy: Whether you’re looking to have a game of bocce, sing karaoke, or watch a movie in the theatre, there’s always fun to be found, no matter what night of the week.

featured.title: More Social
featured.copy: Host large gatherings in one of three party rooms, or cater a special event in the main lounge. BBQ with friends on the expansive outdoor terrace, or book a guest suite and invite your family from out of town.

vision.title:
More
Of Everything
You Can Imagine
vision.copy: Imagine your every need integrated into one truly magnificent location. Gilmore Place offers the effortless convergence of luxuriously appointed homes with modern shops, dining, and office space. Situated in the accessible and thriving Brentwood community, Gilmore Place is a masterpiece of lifestyle, commerce, recreation, and much more.

sitemap.title: Select a Hotspot to learn more about Gilmore Place

hotspots.title: Gilmore Skytrain Station
hotspots.copy: Integrated at the heart of Gilmore Place, seamlessly connecting you to the rest of the Lower Mainland

hotspots.title: Unrivaled Amenities
hotspots.copy: Over 75,000 sq ft. of unparalleled private indoor and outdoor spaces

hotspots.title: Vibrant Urban Hub
hotspots.copy: An impressive mix of retail shops, restaurants, and services right outside your door

hotspots.title: Lively Open-Air Plazas
hotspots.copy: Stroll through inviting plazas and pedestrian mews, interconnected throughout the community

hotspots.title: Convenient Connectivity
hotspots.copy: Connect to the extensive bike path network, including the Central Valley Greenway

hotspots.title: Dynamic Office Spaces
hotspots.copy: A vibrant urban energy will radiate from new creative talent, from small businesses to corporate headquarters

content.title:
More
to Discover
content.copy: Experience the cultural and personal enrichment of living in an energetic urban centre. With incredible pedestrian-oriented shopping and retail located at Gilmore Place, you’ll never run out of things to do. In addition to your daily conveniences, a diverse mix of restaurants, grocery, fashion and entertainment await you, and important resources like schools and healthcare are all within arm’s reach.

content.title:
More to
Explore
content.copy: Stroll through pedestrian mews and shopping areas, pick up fresh groceries, or dine out with friends. Make yourself at home in the neighbourhood or easily transit to new and exciting locations.

transit.title:
More
Places to go
transit.copy: A major stop on the Millennium SkyTrain Line and just minutes from Highway 1, Gilmore Place is seamlessly connected with the rest of the Lower Mainland. Whether you’re working in downtown Vancouver, visiting family in Coquitlam, or hiking the North Shore Mountains, a direct line to all of your premier destinations is just steps outside your front door.

content.title:
The Finest
of Residences
content.copy: Expect a new level of living at Gilmore Place. Open floorplans gracefully balance contemporary interiors and elegant outdoor spaces. Come home to European-inspired kitchens and spa-like bathrooms – a luxuriously appointed destination with extensive, modern features.

features.title: Welcome Home
list: Arrive home to luxuriously appointed towers designed by award-winning IBI Architects, featuring a double height, elegantly appointed lobby with the added convenience of a 24-hour concierge
Have peace of mind with solid reinforced concrete construction, offering superior durability, ease of maintenance, and quiet living
Enjoy large outdoor balconies and/or terraces, for relaxed living, or entertaining friends and family
Elegant, modern homes with expansive windows that maximize natural light and sweeping views
Connection to district energy system provides high-efficiency in-suite heating and cooling, while substantially reducing greenhouse gas emissions and optimizing energy use
Comprehensive 2-5-10 year home warranty protection: 2-year coverage on labour and materials; 5-year coverage on building envelope; 10-year coverage on major structural items

features.title: Premium Suite Finishes
list: Choose from three professionally designed colour palettes to personalize your home: Gilmore, Dawson, or Lougheed
Contemporary wide plank laminate flooring throughout kitchen, living, and dining areas creates a seamless transition between spaces
Premium wool blend bedroom carpet throughout bedrooms and walk-in closets
Master bedroom closets outfitted with built-in millwork to keep clothes organized
Whirlpool full-size high-efficiency front-loading stacked washer and dryer, with 12x24” porcelain tile flooring in laundry closets
Expansive, over-height 9’ flat-painted ceilings throughout living spaces (in most homes)
Over-height 7’ interior doors create a grand and open feeling

Comfort and privacy provided by UV blocking white roller blinds on all exterior windows, in addition to a high performance and acoustically engineered window system designed to reduce noise transfer while increasing UV protection and insulation

sections.title: One & Jr. Two Bedroom Homes

list.title: Integrated European Appliance Package featuring:
items: 24” Blomberg paneled refrigerator with bottom mount freezer
24” Fulgor Milano stainless steel 4-burner gas cooktop
24” slim profile Faber pullout hood fan
Under-counter 1.6 cu ft Panasonic microwave with stainless steel trim kit

list: Sophisticated 3cm composite stone countertops and matching waterfall gable ends on multi-functional kitchen islands, with open shelves and cabinets for storage, as well as an extended kitchen work surface or dining space for four guests (refer to plan)
Extra deep single-bowl stainless steel undermount sink featuring garburator with countertop push-button control allows food preparation and cleaning with ease

sections.title: Two & Three Bedroom Homes

list.title: Integrated European Appliance Package featuring:
items: Two side-by-side 24” Blomberg paneled refrigerators with bottom mount freezer
30” Fulgor Milano stainless steel 5-burner gas cooktop
30” slim profile Faber pullout hood fan

list: 3cm composite stone countertops and matching waterfall gable ends on kitchen islands, with breakfast bar overhang
Extra deep double-bowl stainless steel undermount sink featuring garburator with countertop push-button control allows food preparation and cleaning with ease

sections.title: All Homes
list: Built-in nook with composite stone countertop to be used as a functional desk or computer area (in most homes), complete with plug-in USB outlet for convenient charging of your smartphone or other electronic devices
Built-in pantry with adjustable interior shelving for optimal organization
Premium marble tile over-height backsplash impressively frames the kitchen
Custom cabinets with soft-close mechanism, integrated finger pulls on all doors and drawers for sleek flush cabinetry, and premium drawer sides and slides
Contemporary polished chrome kitchen faucet with extractable spray for convenient clean up
Energy-efficient under-cabinet LED puck lights and overhead pot lighting in kitchen area to illuminate entire workspace

features.title: Luxurious Bathrooms
list: Refined bathrooms feature 12” x 24” premium marble tile flooring
NuHeat heated floors in master or primary bathroom
3cm composite stone countertops with 8” high backsplash create spa-like serenity
Custom cabinetry with sleek integrated finger pulls and soft-close mechanism
Medicine cabinet included in all bathrooms provides additional storage
Sleek single lever faucet with undermount sink
Inviting soaker tubs feature premium marble tile apron front
Frameless glass enclosed shower with slim profile acrylic base, equipped with a convenient slide bar and handheld shower arm, and single lever, pressure-balanced control
Shower walls feature ceramic tile with convenient recessed tile niche for storage
Water-conscious low flow toilet with soft-close seat
Contemporary and functional mirror complement designer-chosen wall sconces, and pot lighting

features.title: Safety and Security
list: State-of-the-art security systems, including closed circuit cameras, electronic keyless lobby entry phone, access controls to each floor, and amply-lit gated keyless underground parking for residents and visitors
Controlled, well-lit storage and bike rooms with motion sensors
Solid core wood entry door with peephole and deadbolt
Continuous fire protection, including sprinklers and smoke detectors in all homes and common areas

cta.title: Commercial Leasing Inquires
cta.copy: Be part of Gilmore Place’s vibrant office & retail community.

shop.title:
More Places
To Shop
shop.copy: At Gilmore Place, enjoy a diverse mix of retail shops and services. Try on the newest fashion styles from global brands, or find an eclectic piece from a local favourite. The retailers at Gilmore Place will offer something for every style and occasion.

stats.subtitle:
Square feet of new transit-
oriented retail space

list.title: The Shops
list.copy: Gilmore Place is poised to be an exciting new shopping destination for all of Metro Vancouver.

list.title: The Flexibility
list.copy: Stroll through open-air plazas and pedestrian mews while checking out the latest fashion and accessories.

list.title: The Accessibility
list.copy: A prime, transit-oriented location and design means Gilmore Place will become a central urban hub for residents and visitors alike.

dine.title:
More Places
To Dine
dine.copy: Head downstairs to pick up a dozen eggs, meet a friend for coffee, or experience culinary perfection at a local restaurant. Celebrate the region’s best right outside your front door.

stats.subtitle:
Square feet of new transit-
oriented retail space

list.title: Gourmet Experiences
list.copy: Celebrate the region’s best with exciting new places to dine, including specialty restaurants and eateries.

list.title: Casual Dining
list.copy: Enjoy your favourite comfort foods just steps from your front door.

list.title: On-The-Go
list.copy: Browse an array of quick, delightful foods for those in a hurry.

play.title:
More Places
To Play
play.copy: Spacious parks, expansive plazas, and inviting pedestrian mews surround Gilmore Place, offering an abundance of green and urban spaces to socialize and have fun.

list.title: Parks Close By
list.copy: You’ll find parks and cycling trails in every direction, with nature beckoning you to go even further.

list.title: Open-air Plazas
list.copy: Get a breath of fresh air and catch up with a friend in one of Gilmore Place’s several public gathering spaces.

list.title: Pedestrian Mews
list.copy: Feel the urban energy, whether you are window shopping or strolling with a friend, as bustling patios spill onto lively boardwalks throughout Gilmore Place.

work.title:
More Places
To Work
work.copy: Office spaces abound at Gilmore Place, allowing you to truly live, work, and play in one locale. With the added convenience of the Millennium SkyTrain integrated into the heart of Gilmore Place, working in the area has never been easier.

stats.title:
Up to 1
Million
stats.subtitle:
Square feet of sustainable
office space

list.title: The Convenience
list.copy: With a myriad of stores, shops, and retail services right downstairs, Gilmore Place is an enjoyable community for employees and employers alike.

list.title: The Flexibility
list.copy: Customize your space: Gilmore Place has the flexibility to welcome businesses of all sizes.

list.title: The Accessibility
list.copy: A prime, transit-oriented location and design means Gilmore Place will become a central urban hub for residents and visitors alike.

about.title:
More
Experience
about.copy: The Onni Group is one of North America’s leading private real estate developers, with extensive experience designing, developing, building and managing innovative projects. As a fully integrated company that directly oversees every step in the development process, Onni has built over 12,000 homes. In addition, the company owns and manages more than 11.5 million square feet of commercial property, over 6,200 rental apartment units, and has an additional 10 million square feet in various stages of development. With offices in Vancouver, Toronto, Chicago, Los Angeles, Seattle, Phoenix and Mexico, Onni continues to expand and diversify into new markets throughout North America.

cta.copy: For more information about Onni, visit our website
